code:
%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#667eea'}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    
    Idle --> Monitoring: CRON tick / YieldSnapshot event
    
    Monitoring --> Comparing: Collect APY data
    
    Comparing --> NoAction: APY diff < 0.5%
    Comparing --> SmallRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change < 50%
    Comparing --> LargeRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change >= 50%
    
    NoAction --> Idle: emit RebalanceSkipped
    
    SmallRebalance --> Executing: emit Callback(executeRebalance)
    
    LargeRebalance --> PendingFinality: Queue rebalance
    PendingFinality --> PendingFinality: Wait 64 blocks
    PendingFinality --> Executing: Finality reached
    
    Executing --> Completed: Rebalance executed
    Completed --> Idle: Reset
    
    note right of Monitoring
        Every ~12 minutes
        or on manual trigger
    end note
    
    note right of PendingFinality
        Safety measure for
        large TVL changes
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个收益再平衡机器人的状态机。核心流程是：从Idle开始，CRON触发后进入Monitoring采集数据，然后Comparing对比APY，根据差异大小决定要不要调仓。
明白。那Comparing之后具体分几种情况？是简单的二分支还是多分支？
三分支。APY差异小于0.5%就走NoAction直接回Idle；等于0.5%但仓位变化小于50%是SmallRebalance；等于50%则是LargeRebalance。后两者执行路径不一样。
好的，三分支画好了。SmallRebalance直接emit Callback进入Executing，LargeRebalance我让它先进PendingFinality等待区块确认，这样对吗？
PendingFinality那里需要加个自循环，要等64个区块才能进Executing。这是大额调仓的安全机制，防止重组风险。
收到，已加上Wait 64 blocks的自循环。Executing完成后到Completed，然后Reset回Idle，整个闭环。需要给Monitoring和PendingFinality加注释说明吗？
要的。Monitoring旁边注明每12分钟触发或手动触发；PendingFinality注明是大额资金变动的安全措施。另外NoAction回Idle时要emit RebalanceSkipped事件。
全部完成。状态流转：Idle→Monitoring→Comparing三分支，SmallRebalance直进Executing，LargeRebalance经PendingFinality等待64区块后进入Executing，最终Completed回Idle。两个注释也已添加。
